purpose: Generated plan/report mapping RV8GR chip split records to virtual test instruments.
claim_boundary: Generated virtual benches prove model behavior and stress selected assumptions. Physical hardware still needs real voltage, timing, and oscilloscope evidence.

delay_noise_policy.student_note: DelayNoise shows what could go wrong between chips. If a design only passes with zero delay, it is not ready for real wiring.

chips.rv8gr_role: NAND gates for control decode and glue logic.
Inverters for active-low control and reset/clock glue.
Dual 4-input AND gates for decode and control qualification.
Positive-edge D flip-flops for flags, IRQ latch, and synchronous state.
XOR gates for ALU and compare/control paths.
Quad muxes for address and data path selection.

split_records.reason: 74HC157 disabled outputs drive low instead of high-Z.
74HC157 has unidirectional driven outputs and no shared bus output enable.

chips.rv8gr_role: Positive-edge program counter and counter-style state.

split_records.reason: 74HC161 has driven logic outputs and no tri-state output enable.
74HC161 does not expose bidirectional or tri-state bus pins.

chips.rv8gr_role: Bidirectional bus transceiver for shared bus isolation.
Octal buffers for unidirectional bus and LED/probe-visible outputs.
Positive-edge octal registers for IR, AC, page, and data-path latches.
Alliance 32K x 8 SRAM option for RAM.
32K x 8 EEPROM option for program ROM.
Flash ROM option for program storage.
